flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Amridge University rose 29% between 2017 and 2020 ($25.0k → $32.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at Amridge University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (226 vs 299).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Amridge University rose 125% between 2021 and 2024 (44.4% → 100.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Amridge University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.0% → 0.0%).
